### Post by GCFreak on 2009-06-27
Hi,

After reading [threads](http://ubuntuforums.org/showthread.php?t=1015673) and [tutorials](https://help.ubuntu.com/community/DialupModemHowto/Conexant) about how to get this thing to work properly, I've almost hit home. Carrier check is off, stupid mode is not being used. The connection stays up, but I can't load any webpages. The only way they can get on the Internet is dial-up (through Windows Vista at the moment) so I can't do much with regards to installing packages. This is for a friend, I'm not at my home with my uber-fast broadband =P

So any help is appreciated, and I'm sure a lot of other people would appreciate this too. This is under Ubuntu 9.04.

EDIT: Here are a couple of screenshots, and just to say, I'm using the so-called "lazy" TAR file of those drivers from the tutorial.
